What We Offer

Our Services

Residential & Commercial

Concrete Work Done Right

We handle the full scope of concrete flatwork — from small residential sidewalks to large commercial pours.

Residential

Driveways

From standard broom-finish slabs to stamped and stained decorative driveways, we pour driveways that hold up to Kansas weather and heavy vehicle traffic. Proper base prep and reinforcement on every job.

  • Single & double-wide
  • Stamped & stained finishes
  • Apron replacement
  • Expansion joints included
Residential

Patios & Walkways

Transform your backyard into a functional outdoor living space. We work with your landscaping layout to design and pour custom patios, sidewalks, and connecting walkways.

  • Custom shapes & borders
  • Exposed aggregate options
  • Step construction
  • Broom or smooth finish
Residential

Garage & Shop Floors

A properly prepared and poured garage floor makes all the difference. We handle sub-grade prep, vapor barriers, reinforcement, and finishing so you get a floor that won't crack or heave.

  • Vapor barrier installation
  • Rebar & wire mesh
  • Control joint planning
  • Smooth or broom finish
Commercial

Parking Lots & Lots

Commercial concrete parking areas designed for heavy vehicle loads and long-term durability. We coordinate with general contractors and work within project schedules.

  • ADA-compliant curb cuts
  • Reinforced for heavy loads
  • Line prep & marking ready
  • Phased pours available
Commercial

Foundations & Slabs

Concrete foundations and flatwork for new construction, additions, and outbuildings. We work from engineered plans and coordinate with your framing crew.

  • Residential & light commercial
  • Engineered plan review
  • Slab-on-grade & stem wall
  • Anchor bolt placement
Specialty

Concrete Repair & Replacement

Cracked, sunken, or deteriorated concrete? We assess the root cause and provide repair or full-replacement solutions to restore safety and appearance.

  • Crack repair & sealing
  • Mudjacking assessment
  • Partial & full slab replacement
  • Trip hazard removal
How It Works

Our Process

01

Free Estimate

We come to you, measure the job, and give you a written estimate — no pressure, no guesswork.

02

Site Prep

We excavate, grade, and compact the sub-base. This is where quality starts — a good pour is only as good as what's underneath.

03

Forms & Reinforcement

We set forms to grade, install rebar or wire mesh as needed, and plan control joints to manage natural cracking.

04

Pour & Finish

Concrete is placed, screed, and finished to the specified texture. Our crew works efficiently to get the right finish before the concrete sets.

05

Cure & Cleanup

We apply curing compound as needed, strip forms, and leave your site clean. Final inspection walk-through with you before we leave.

Get Started

Ready for Your Estimate?

Give us a call or fill out our contact form and we'll schedule a time to come out, measure, and provide a detailed written estimate — free of charge.

Request a Free Quote See Our Projects

Family-owned and operated, Ortega & Sons Concrete delivers expert residential and commercial concrete work throughout the Wichita, KS area. Quality craftsmanship on every pour.
